name_en: 《Grey Military Green》CHANEL🚩🚩 Oversized logo suede double-pocket chain ⛓️ bag, airport shopping bag! This brown double-pocket bag is really special 🤩. The dusty green overall look has a great vibe. It feels very cool when worn! Definitely a viral aesthetic bright color. The inner small cowhide feels super soft and chewy. Easy to grab and go, super nice. Chanel Flirt is the one! Can take it home~! Like its simple, casual, and free-spirited style. This color double-pocket bag is so beautiful! The material feels like a mix of suede and leather, not as soft as pure suede, but not hard either, just right. This color is also great for grandma's outfits 😍😍 Size: 34x25x10cm
